untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of earnings announcements and earnings surprise magnitude (standard deviations from consensus), which are fundamental/macro events not available in the provided technical indicator set. The core logic depends on external event data and statistical comparison to analyst consensus—neither of which can be expressed using only price, volume, and technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using volume spike (common post-announcement behavior) and directional reversal exits. However, the signal's primary mechanism—identifying earnings surprises >= 1.0 stddev from consensus and directional alignment—requires earnings event detection and fundamental data unavailable in the indicator library. A complete implementation would require an earnings calendar and consensus data feed external to this engine.
